mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.remark, t0.property_code, t0.property_end_date, t0.property_owner, t0.area, t0.asset_use, t0.address, t0.property_transfer_ownership, t0.property_info_id, t0.asset_unit_state, t0.land_use_nature, t0.original_value, t0.do_id, t0.do_type, t0.property_money, t0.parent_id
mapper.select:
select pi.affiliated_unit,pi.property_name,pi.project_name,pi.land_use_nature,pi.transfer_ownership_remark, pri.area,pri.address,pri.property_owner,pri.property_end_date,pri.property_code,pri.original_value,pri.asset_unit_state, sub.property_money from property_right_info pri left join property_info pi on pri.property_info_id = pi.id and pri.parent_id is null left join ( select aid.property_right_info_id,sum(aid.property_money) as property_money from asset_transfer t left join asset_income_distribution aid on t.id=aid.do_id where t.flow_state='completed' and aid.property_id is not null GROUP BY aid.property_right_info_id union all select property_right_info_id,sum(property_money) as property_money from asset_income_distribution where do_type='LEASE_PAYMENT_CYCLE' and property_id is not null GROUP BY property_right_info_id ) sub on pri.id=sub.property_right_info_id
AND pi.property_name like CONCAT('%', #{request.propertyName}, '%')
AND pi.project_name like CONCAT('%', #{request.projectName}, '%')
AND pri.asset_unit_state = #{request.assetUnitState}
AND pri.property_end_date BETWEEN
#{item}
AND pi.follow_up_person like CONCAT('%', #{request.followUpPerson}, '%')
